query: SELECT table_name FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema = 'public' AND table_name LIKE '%mortgage%' OR table_name LIKE '%tax%' OR table_name LIKE '%insurance%' OR table_name LIKE '%cadastral%' ORDER BY table_name;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user NzNswwN3cq6gauf.53d7f32ec8a4 --database Md9ypRHK4yuz574ZuX5amw --execute SELECT table_name FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema = 'public' AND table_name LIKE '%mortgage%' OR table_name LIKE '%tax%' OR table_name LIKE '%insurance%' OR table_name LIKE '%cadastral%' ORDER BY table_name;
